hooks.command: echo '{"systemMessage": "MEMORY.md 已加载。项目记忆索引位于 .claude/projects/.../MEMORY.md，重要节点请提醒写入记忆。"}'
echo '{"systemMessage": "上下文即将压缩。会话中的重要决策、冲突、修复模式等请先写入记忆（memory/*.md），压缩后这些细节将丢失。"}'

if (git diff --name-only HEAD -- docs/execution/ 2>/dev/null; git ls-files --others --exclude-standard -- docs/execution/ 2>/dev/null) | grep -q .; then echo '{"systemMessage": "docs/execution/ 有未提交的变更 — 确认是否需要写入记忆"}'; fi
